info.title: Duos API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for Duos application - A social matching platform

post.description: Register a new user with email, password and mobile number. An OTP will be sent to verify the mobile number.

message.example: OTP sent to your mobile number. Please verify to complete registration.

post.description: Register a new couple with partner details. An OTP will be sent to verify the mobile number.

message.example: OTP sent to your mobile number. Please verify to complete duo registration.

400.description: Bad request or error during registration

post.description: Authenticate a user with mobile number and password
Verify OTP sent to user's mobile number for registration or password reset
Resend OTP to user's mobile number

message.example: OTP has been resent to your mobile number

post.description: Send password reset OTP to user's mobile number

message.example: Password reset OTP has been sent to your mobile number

post.description: Reset user password using OTP verification

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's information

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the other user in the conversation

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page

200.description: List of messages in the conversation

post.summary: Send a message to a user

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the recipient user

403.description: Not matched with this user or conversation not found

post.summary: Send an image message to a user

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the recipient user

image.description: Image file to upload (max: 5MB, allowed types: jpg,jpeg,png,gif)

403.description: Not matched with this user or conversation not found

post.summary: Send a gift to a user

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the user to send the gift to

400.description: Insufficient balance or gift not found

get.summary: Get all gifts received by a user

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the user who received the gifts

200.description: List of gifts received by the user

get.summary: Get all gifts sent by the authenticated user

200.description: List of gifts sent by the user

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of leaderboard (daily, weekly, monthly, all_time)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top users to return

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of leaderboard (daily, weekly, monthly, all_time)

get.summary: Get leaderboard positions around the current user

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of leaderboard (daily, weekly, monthly, all_time)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of positions to return (total, including the user's position)

200.description: Leaderboard positions around user retrieved successfully

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of leaderboard (daily, weekly, monthly, all_time)

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of reports. Admins can view all reports, while regular users can only view their own reports.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter reports by status

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter reports by type

parameters.name: reported_user_id
parameters.description: Filter reports by reported user ID

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page (1-100)

message.example: You do not have permission to view all reports.

get.summary: Get a list of reports submitted by the current user

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter reports by status (pending, in_progress, resolved, rejected)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter reports by type (user, content, bug, other)

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of reports per page

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Report ID

403.description: Not authorized to view this report

message.example: You do not have permission to view this report.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Report ID

action_taken.description: Action taken in response to the report

403.description: Not authorized to update this report

message.example: You do not have permission to update this report.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Report ID

403.description: Not authorized to delete this report

message.example: You do not have permission to delete this report.

get.description: Retrieves all application settings. Requires admin privileges.

post.description: Creates a new application setting. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Retrieves all public application settings. No authentication required.
Retrieves settings by group name. Returns only public settings for non-admin users.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: The group name of the settings to retrieve

404.description: No settings found for the specified group

get.summary: Get a specific setting by key
get.description: Retrieves a specific setting by its key. Non-public settings require admin access.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the setting to retrieve

put.description: Updates an existing application setting. Requires admin privileges.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the setting to update

post.description: Authenticate a user using Google OAuth
Authenticate a user using Facebook OAuth
Authenticate a user using Apple Sign In

200.description: List of profiles to swipe on

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the user to like

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the user to dislike

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the user to super like

get.summary: Get users who liked the authenticated user

200.description: List of users who liked the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's profile information

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile information

post.description: Uploads a new avatar image for the authenticated user

avatar.description: Image file (jpeg, png, jpg, gif, max 2MB)

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data

post.description: Disables the user's profile by setting status to 'disabled'. User data is preserved and can be reactivated.

reason.example: Taking a break from the platform

message.example: Profile disabled successfully. You can reactivate it by logging in again.

post.description: Reactivates a previously disabled user profile

400.description: Invalid credentials or account not disabled

404.description: User not found or not disabled

mobile.description: User's mobile number in E.164 format

device_type.description: Type of device used for login

remember_me.description: Whether to extend the token expiration time

mobile.description: User's mobile number in E.164 format (must be unique)

bio.description: Short bio or description about the user
bio.example: Hello, I'm John! I love hiking and photography.

registration_type.description: Type of registration - 'single' for individual, 'duo' for couple

social_provider.description: Social login provider (if registering via social login)

social_id.description: Social provider's user ID (if registering via social login)

access_token.description: Access token from social provider (if registering via social login)

identity_token.description: Identity token from social provider (if registering via Apple or other providers that use it)

email.description: Primary email address for the couple's account (must be unique)

mobile.description: Primary mobile number for the couple's account (must be unique)

dob.description: Primary account holder's date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD)

bio.description: Short bio or description about the couple
bio.example: We are a fun-loving couple who enjoy traveling and trying new things together!

partner1_name.description: Full name of the first partner

partner1_email.description: Email of the first partner (must be different from primary email)

partner1_photo.description: Profile photo for the first partner (JPEG, PNG, JPG, GIF, max 2MB)

partner2_name.description: Full name of the second partner

partner2_email.description: Email of the second partner (must be different from primary and first partner's email)

partner2_photo.description: Profile photo for the second partner (JPEG, PNG, JPG, GIF, max 2MB)

items.example: The field name field is required.

tags.name: Swipe
tags.description: Swipe functionality for matching with other users

tags.name: User Management
tags.description: Endpoints for managing user profiles and account settings
